tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix entityKind seeding and ctxTrace population
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make tracingHandler produce entries with correct entityKind and populate ctxTrace.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/aspects/fx/trace.nix
- Test: templates/ci/modules/features/fx-trace.nix

**Verify:** nix develop -c just ci fx-trace

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add record-fired handler for policy trace entries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture fired policy names as trace entries for policy dispatch nodes.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/aspects/fx/trace.nix
- Test: templates/ci/modules/features/fx-trace.nix

**Verify:** nix develop -c just ci fx-trace

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add entityInstance tracking to trace and graph IR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each trace entry carries entityInstance field, graph IR gains entityInstances list.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/aspects/fx/trace.nix
- Modify: nix/lib/diag/graph.nix

**Verify:** nix develop -c just ci fx-trace + build laptop-ir

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update mermaid renderer for instance subgraphs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DAG diagrams group nodes into per-instance subgraphs with policy bridges.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/diag/mermaid.nix

**Verify:** Build laptop-dag, check for subgraph blocks

tasks.subject: Task 5: Investigate and fix anonymous nodes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Determine what anon nodes are, then prune artifacts or enrich labels.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/aspects/fx/trace.nix

**Verify:** Build laptop-dag, check for unexplained anon nodes

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rename views from stage to scope vocabulary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update view IDs, titles, and function names from stage to scope.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/diag/views.nix, sequence.nix, default.nix, diagrams.nix

**Verify:** Build laptop-scope-seq

tasks.subject: Task 7: Update filters and full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure all filters handle entityInstances, full CI + diagram regen passes.

**Files:**
- Modify: nix/lib/diag/filters/

**Verify:** nix develop -c just ci + write-diagrams
